violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Storage room contained peanut butter stored on floor not 6inches off floor.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Apple sauce and jelly not date marked in refrigerator.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Observed to be blocked and not have soap. Using restroom sink.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelves, floors need cleaning.
Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Exposed studs, joists or rafters *were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. Missing ceiling tiles.
